predictions.source_quote: We maintain our base case for recession in 2023, first in Europe, then the US. Severity will be influenced by Fed policy, gas flows and fiscal response in Europe, and China's recovery. We see a cyclical (shallow) recession in the US as most likely.
We maintain our base case for recession in 2023, first in Europe, then the US.
Broad downside risks to global growth, with some pockets of strength mainly in EMs
